# opnsense_quagga_bgp_aspath (Resource)

Manages a BGP AS-path access list entry on OPNsense (FRR). Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: `permit` or `deny`.
- `as_pattern` (String) AS-path regular expression to match.
- `number` (Number) AS-path list number (0-4294967295).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this entry is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
